name: @voivox/desktop
description: VOIVOX local-first, silent audio-to-text workstation for macOS.
author: VOIVOX contributors

scripts.build: vite build && esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --external:electron --outfile=dist/electron/main.js && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=cjs --external:electron --outfile=dist/electron/preload.js && mkdir -p dist/resources && cp ../../native/asr/voivox_asr_worker.py dist/resources/ && (cd ../../native/macos && swift build -c release) && cp ../../native/macos/.build/release/voivox-host dist/resources/
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never

extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: VOIVOX 需要访问所选应用的音频，以便在本机静音转写。
